acceptance_criteria.text: For linked-character Telegram turns, live context passed into the developer prompt must include the current region name derived from the character's current solar system via local SDE, so "мой регион" questions do not require the model to ask the user for the region name first.
proof: src/agent/executor.ts adds resolveSystemLocationContext(...) and includes region in fetchLiveContext(...).
src/agent/prompts.ts adds an explicit instruction to interpret current-location phrasing from live context.
gaps: Not deployed at the moment this evidence file was written.

acceptance_criteria.text: Live context enrichment must preserve existing safety behavior: it may use private ESI only through the existing capability-gated path and must fail closed to null without leaking tokens or raw secret errors into model-facing prompt text.
proof: fetchLiveContext(...) still calls getEveCapabilities(...) before private ESI access.
The new code returns null on live-context failure and only adds a warning log outside model-facing prompt text.
gaps: Observed production decrypt failures are operational and not fixed by this code-only patch.

acceptance_criteria.text: Regression coverage must prove the location-chain enrichment logic resolves system -> constellation -> region from SDE and preserves existing cold/warm executor behavior.
proof: tests/unit/warm-cold-path.test.ts adds direct SDE-backed region-resolution coverage.
Raw command outputs exist for unit tests, typecheck, lint, and build.
gaps: No extra integration test was added.

acceptance_criteria.text: Evidence must include the production-server investigation result distinguishing proxy/API behavior from app-side behavior, with concrete proof for the observed root causes.
proof: raw/server-findings.txt captures the server checkout state, proxy base URL, PM2 findings, and manual reproductions.
The investigation distinguished recovered proxy tool-state mismatch from app-side live-context shortcomings and separate private ESI decrypt failures.
gaps: Server deployment and operational cleanup are separate steps.

known_gaps: This evidence bundle does not itself perform production deployment.
Production PM2 logs also show separate private-token decrypt failures that may need operational follow-up.
